name: Lemon Sweet & Sour Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the lemon peel and sauté it in oil.
2. Add sugar and lemon juice from two lemons to the mixture.
3. Mix cornstarch with water separately.
4. Gradually add the cornstarch-water mixture to the sauce, stirring continuously.
5. Cook over medium heat until the sauce is smooth and thick.
6. This sauce pairs well with chicken.
